title: Shri Katyayani Mata Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Katyayani Mata Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Goddess Katyayani.
description:
Jai Jai Ambe Jai Katyayani,
Jai Jag Mata jag ki Maharani.
Baijnath sthan tumhara,
Vahan vardati naam pukara॥
॥ Jai Katyayani Mata ॥

Kayi naam hain kayi dham hain,
Yeh sthan bhi to sukhdham hai.
Har mandir mein jyot tumhari,
Kahi Yogeshwari mahima nyari॥
॥ Jai Katyayani Mata ॥

Har jagah utsav hote rehte,
Har mandir mein bhagat hai kehte.
Katyayani rakshak kaya ki,
Granthi kaate moh maya ki॥
॥ Jai Katyayani Mata ॥

Jhoothe moh se chudane wali,
Apna naam japane wali.
Brihaspativaar ko puja kariye,
Dhyan Katyayani ka dhariye॥
॥ Jai Katyayani Mata ॥

Har sankat ko door karegi,
Bhandare bharpoor karegi.
Jo bhi Maa ko bhakt pukare,
Katyayani sab kasht nivare॥
॥ Jai Katyayani Mata ॥
